text_block_list.text:
I'm walking past the academy entrance on my day
off, when...

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text: Oh, Big Bro! Are you on your way home?

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text: Oh, Big Sis! Are you on your way home?

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
Ehe, I just got back too. ♪ I went to a stone
sauna to boost my metabolism and do some
detox!

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text: Whaddya think? Do I look cute?

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text: Maybe I should go sweat it out some more...

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
Hey, do you mind bringing my bag back to the
dorm for me?

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
Hey, do you mind bringing my bag back to the
dorm for me?

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text: I wanna run a few laps out here. Is that okay?
choice_data_list: Do you want some help with your training?

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
Today's special training is all about getting rid of
my carelessness and the damage it caused.

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text: So just let me do this one myself, okay?

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
Besides, I actually wanna ask you to do something
else for me, ehe. ☆
choice_data_list: What do you want me to do?

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
Besides, I actually wanna ask you to do something
else for me, ehe. ☆
choice_data_list: What do you want me to do?

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
When I'm super cute, I just want you to call me
cute a whooole bunch! ♪

A few days later, Curren Chan comes up to me
with a slimmer face and says, "Look who's back in
shape!"
